title: Scheduled posts skip relay fan-out
description: File: src/delivery.rs:607. process_scheduled_posts calls enqueue_to_followers but does not call enqueue_to_relays for public visibility posts. This means scheduled public posts won't be propagated to relays, unlike interactively-created ones. Fix: add the same 'if visibility == public { enqueue_to_relays(...) }' pattern after the enqueue_to_followers call.
